overall.description: Gameplay footage from Black Myth: Wukong showing an armored warrior character exploring a snow-covered traditional Chinese temple complex. The character moves from an outdoor courtyard past an ornate incense burner, ascends stone steps into the temple, and approaches a massive golden Buddha statue inside the dimly lit interior hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy temple courtyard with incense burner

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy courtyard toward the temple entrance, staff held ready

entered.detail: large wooden temple structure with curved snow-covered roofs and red pillars
multi-tiered ornate stone pagoda-style incense burner with carved details
stone courtyard tiles partially covered in snow
snow-capped mountains visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a wide snowy courtyard outside a traditional Chinese temple. An ornate stone incense burner sits to the right while the large wooden temple building with curved roofs dominates the center view. Snow covers the ground and distant mountains are visible through the winter haze.

events.description: character moves from open courtyard to the covered temple entrance area
lighting dims significantly as character enters the shadowed temple interior

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps leading up to the temple entrance, moving into the building

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
tall red wooden support pillars flanking the entrance
large wooden entrance doors with intricate carvings and red banners
traditional stone lanterns at the base of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends the stone steps leading into the temple. Red wooden pillars frame the entrance as the lighting transitions from natural daylight to the dimmer interior. The carved wooden doors of the temple become prominent as the character enters the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with large Buddha statue

events.description: character fully enters the temple interior revealing the massive central Buddha statue

agents.ego_description: walking around the interior hall observing the large Buddha statue and ornate wooden carvings

entered.detail: massive golden Buddha statue seated in meditation pose on an ornate wooden altar
smaller Buddha statues flanking the central figure on the altar
elaborately carved wooden aureole behind the Buddha with intricate patterns
raised wooden platform supporting the Buddha statues with carved details
dark wooden support columns lining the sides of the temple hall

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit temple hall, the character approaches a massive golden Buddha statue seated on an ornate wooden altar. The interior features elaborate wood carvings, flanking attendant statues, and tall columns. The character moves closer to examine the detailed mandorla and altar as the camera tilts upward to capture the scale of the statue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, snowy exterior courtyard into the dimly lit, opulent interior of a traditional Chinese temple. It begins in a wide winter landscape where snow blankets the ground and a stone incense burner stands before a large wooden temple building set against hazy mountains. As the character moves forward, the camera ascends stone steps and passes through red wooden pillars, shifting the lighting from natural daylight to a muted interior glow. The scene then opens into a vast hall filled with elaborate wood carvings and tall columns, leading the character toward a massive golden Buddha statue seated on an ornate altar. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the immense scale of the statue and its detailed mandorla as the character draws closer.
